name: The Coaching Framework
description: For coaches, consultants, and 1:1 service providers

readme.overview: The Coaching Framework is built for 1:1 service providers who need a complete journey from inquiry to alumni retention without duct-taping tools.
readme.whyThisPipeline: The 8-stage pipeline follows the natural coaching client journey: from first inquiry through active coaching to alumni status. Each stage maps to practical handoffs and automation triggers.
readme.whyTheseEmails: 7 email templates cover the full client lifecycle: welcome, prep, follow-up, onboarding, reminders, testimonial requests, and alumni check-ins. Each template keeps a warm, empowering coaching voice.
readme.whyTheseBookings: Two booking types support the core sales-to-delivery motion: a free 30-minute discovery call and a paid 60-minute coaching session. Built-in buffers protect coach energy and scheduling quality.
readme.whyTheseAutomations: 6 suggested automations handle recurring operational tasks coaches often miss: lead follow-up, reminders, inactivity nudges, testimonial capture, alumni care, and optional SMS confirmations.

bookingTypes.name: Discovery Call
bookingTypes.description: A free, no-pressure conversation to explore what you're working on and whether coaching is the right next step.

bookingTypes.name: Coaching Session
bookingTypes.description: Your dedicated coaching hour. Come with one thing you want to shift — we'll go deep.

emailTemplates.name: Welcome
emailTemplates.subject: Thanks for reaching out, {{firstName}}

emailTemplates.name: Discovery Prep
emailTemplates.subject: Before our call — one quick thing
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Looking forward to our call. To make the most of our time together, I'd love to know:

1. What's your biggest challenge right now?
2. What does success look like for you?
3. What have you already tried?

Just hit reply with a few thoughts.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Post-Discovery Follow-Up
emailTemplates.subject: Great connecting, {{firstName}}

emailTemplates.name: Onboarding Welcome
emailTemplates.subject: Welcome aboard — here's how we start

emailTemplates.name: Session Reminder
emailTemplates.subject: See you tomorrow, {{firstName}}
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Just a reminder — we have a session tomorrow. Take a moment to think about:

- What's been on your mind this week?
- What's one thing you want to focus on?

See you soon.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Testimonial Request
emailTemplates.subject: You did the work — would you share your experience?
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Congratulations on completing your program. The transformation I've seen in you has been remarkable.

Would you be open to sharing a brief testimonial? Just a few sentences about:
- Where you were when we started
- What shifted during our work together
- Where you are now

It helps others who are in the same place you were.

Thank you,
{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Alumni Check-In
emailTemplates.subject: Checking in — how's everything going?
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

It's been a while since we wrapped up, and I wanted to check in. How are things going?

If you ever want to reconnect for a tune-up session or have questions, I'm here.

{{ownerName}}

fields.label: What's the #1 thing you want to change in the next 90 days?
How committed are you to making this change? (1-10)
How did you hear about me?

landingPage.headline: Stop overthinking. Start becoming.
landingPage.subhead: {{businessName}} helps you get clear, get moving, and build the life you keep putting off.

seldonExamples.label: Booking
seldonExamples.prompt: Add a 3-question pre-call survey to my discovery calls that asks about goals, challenges, and commitment level
seldonExamples.description: Add a pre-call survey to discovery calls

seldonExamples.label: Email
seldonExamples.prompt: Update my welcome email to include a link to my private resource library and a short personal video introduction
seldonExamples.description: Add your resources to the welcome email

seldonExamples.label: Forms
seldonExamples.prompt: Add branching logic to my intake form — if they select executive coaching show questions about their company, if life coaching show personal goal questions
seldonExamples.description: Add branching logic to your intake form

seldonExamples.label: Pages
seldonExamples.prompt: Add a testimonial carousel and a results section showing before and after client transformations to my landing page
seldonExamples.description: Add testimonials and results to your page

seldonExamples.label: Automations
seldonExamples.prompt: When a client completes their coaching program, automatically generate a personalized completion certificate and email it to them

automationSuggestions.name: Send welcome email when someone reaches out
Follow up if client goes quiet for 7+ days
Ask for testimonial after completing a program
Send check-in to past clients every 90 days
Send SMS confirmation when session is booked
automationSuggestions.message: Your session with {{ownerName}} is confirmed for {{bookingDate}} at {{bookingTime}}. See you there!
